name: PT Paninvest Tbk
summary: PT Paninvest Tbk provides life insurance products in Indonesia. It operates through Life Insurance and Business Consulting Service, Trading and Service, and Tourism segments. The company offers death, personal health, personal accident, unit link, and other insurance products. It also provides business consulting and management, and general administration services, as well as management consulting services in the field of archives. In addition, the company engages in the mutual funds business. The company was formerly known as Pt Panin Insurance Tbk and changed its name to PT Paninvest Tbk in May 2014. PT Paninvest Tbk was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
